details.goal: Navigate to https://practicetestautomation.com/practice-test-login/ and verify the login page loads with username and password fields visible

details.reason: tool=wait_for params=map[selector:#username state:visible] reason=Confirm the Username input (#username) is visible on the loaded login page as the first verification step toward checking both username and password fields.
tool=wait_for params=map[selector:#username state:visible] reason=Verify the Username input from the observed selectors is visible on the loaded login page (next step will check the Password field).
⚠ LOOP DETECTED: step wait_for map[selector:#username state:visible] repeated. Try a different approach. Do NOT finish with success unless observations confirm the goal is met.

tool=evaluate params=map[expression:(function(){const u=document.querySelector('#username');const p=document.querySelector('#password');function isVisible(el){if(!el) return false;const style=window.getComputedStyle(el);const rect=el.getBoundingClientRect();return style && style.visibility!=='hidden' && style.display!=='none' && rect.width>0 && rect.height>0;}return {usernamePresent:!!u,usernameVisible:isVisible(u),passwordPresent:!!p,passwordVisible:isVisible(p)} })()] reason=Verify that the username (#username) and password (#password) inputs are present and visible on the page (confirm login page loaded) without using wait_for for #username.

params.expression: (function(){const u=document.querySelector('#username');const p=document.querySelector('#password');function isVisible(el){if(!el) return false;const style=window.getComputedStyle(el);const rect=el.getBoundingClientRect();return style && style.visibility!=='hidden' && style.display!=='none' && rect.width>0 && rect.height>0;}return {usernamePresent:!!u,usernameVisible:isVisible(u),passwordPresent:!!p,passwordVisible:isVisible(p)} })()

details.reason: tool=wait_for params=map[selector:#password state:visible] reason=Verify the Password input (#password) is visible to confirm both username and password fields are present (avoid repeating the #username wait_for which caused a loop).
tool=finish params=map[status:success] reason=Recent observe_ui() shows #username and #password inputs present on the page, confirming the login page loaded with both fields visible.
